artPrompt: A widescreen dramatic film-still of a portly mayoral figure recoiling on a sunlit town-green stage as a tight ring of grim townsfolk close in, one thrusting forward a clipboard and a rigidly extended handshake like a weapon, golden afternoon light slashing through dust and pollen; picket fences and blank placards recede into haze behind, the air thick with civic menace, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Recall the Mayor
text: Destroy target creature an opponent controls that is a Mayor, an incumbent, or the creature with the greatest power among creatures that player controls. (If there's a tie for greatest power, the table votes which one. Bias is encouraged.)
flavorText: Term limits, but enforced by a clipboard and a very firm handshake.

extras.frontrunnerPunish: kills the biggest creature / Mayor / incumbent
